title: HOME REPAIR - 211info
text: ALBANY AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOME REPAIR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance for low-income older adults and veterans who own their homes and are in need of urgent repairs to improve the health and safety of their living conditions. Examples of repairs include painting, landscaping, brush and junk removal, and siding repair. Program may also repair or replace windows, doors, and wheelchair ramps. Confidential Address Eligibility: Must be a veteran or an older adult with 30%-60% of HUD Median Income for Linn County Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon Email (541) 967-4030 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 967-4030 Intake for veterans Council of Governments (541) 967-8630 Intake for older adults Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Proof of ownership, proof of current house insurance, proof of income, and documentation on any code violations AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services * Older Adults Home Rehabilitation Programs * Older Adults Home Rehabilitation Programs * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
